events.summary: Bi-weekly 1:1 w/Mike Wilkins | Mark Francis (series ends 1/5/2...)

prep.summary: You face a packed agenda—you must align Mike on the Arvy Prep outcomes, focusing on the standardized slide templates, the four-pillar operating model visual, and the tight five-minute-per-portfolio constraint for the RV session. You must also resolve critical carryovers from your June 29 meeting—specifically your pending succession plan, the application rationalization spreadsheet updates, and the broken property loss model.
tasks: Submit your succession planning brief for yourself and James to meet leadership requirements.
Provide updates to the locked application rationalization spreadsheet to target the fifty-million-dollar hygiene fund.
Address the unusable property loss model with Jeff and explore bringing Chris back part-time to fill the data architect gap.
Execute the standardized portfolio slide updates and coordinate with John for the Tech Fellows dress rehearsal.
prep.title: Bi-weekly 1:1 w/Mike Wilkins | Mark Francis (series ends 1/5/2...)

events.summary: Just In Time (JIT) Training Opportunity: IAM Security Cat...

prep.summary: You have successfully cleared the preparation track for the Arvy reviews—standardizing the fifteen portfolio slides under the new "portfolio value" template and routing the finalized deck through John in the Box folder. The primary operational objectives—aligning on the centralized architecture narrative and mapping the core capabilities—are now complete. You must now pivot to the upcoming Tech BoD requirements—specifically addressing the application lifecycle status in TPM and the pending Platform Mindset metrics.
tasks: Verify the finalized Arvy deck in the Tech Fellows Box folder—ensuring all fifteen portfolios reflect the new value-focused layout.
Confirm the dress rehearsal schedule with the Tech Fellows—preventing an unorchestrated run-through during the live session with RV.
Sync with Brenda to secure the room reservation for the Thursday lunch session with RV—guaranteeing all seven Tech Fellows are invited.
Validate the "Time Recommendation" metadata for all applications marked for migration or elimination in TPM—meeting the leadership compliance deadline.
prep.title: Bi-weekly: Tech BoD (series ending 12/22/26)
